message:
feat(ars): add O(K) FST compiler for reflex signatures (ft-tkpgy.3.4)

Trie-based FST with shared prefix compression, O(K) exact lookup,
prefix search, MinHash key serialization, deduplication, and lock-free
hot-swap handle. Closes Track 3. 40 inline + 17 proptest = 57 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
